import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut have = false
  while i <= n
    mut b = 32
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        b = v
      when None
        b = 32
      end
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    else if b == 45 and not have
      sign = -1
    else
      if have
        result = list.push(result, cur * sign)
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      have = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    let n = xs.len()
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        if not inserted and v < x
          result = list.push(result, v)
          inserted = true
        end
        result = list.push(result, x)
      when None
        i = i
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let l1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let l2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let a = parse_line(l1)
  let b = parse_line(l2)
  mut merged: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    merged = insert_sorted(merged, x)
  end
  for x in b
    merged = insert_sorted(merged, x)
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in merged
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
